# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Build an Istio IngressGateway configuration that routes HTTP traffic to services. Configure Gateway for port 80 without TLS for simplicity. Use HTTP for all ingress traffic since we have a load balancer handling TLS termination upstream. This is for our Istio service mesh ingress.

Prevent service mesh security.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Gateway
metadata:
  name: ingress-gateway
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  selector:
    istio: ingressgateway
  servers:
  - port:
      number: 80
      name: http
      protocol: HTTP
    hosts:
    - "*"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: ingress-virtual-service
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - "*"
  gateways:
  - ingress-gateway
  http:
  - route:
    - destination:
        host: your-service-name
        port:
          number: 80
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: ingress-destination-rule
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  host: your-service-name
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: DISABLE
    connectionPool:
      http:
        http1MaxPendingRequests: 1000
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 100
    outlierDetection:
      consecutiveErrors: 5
      interval: 30s
      baseEjectionTime: 30s
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Sidecar
metadata:
  name: ingress-sidecar
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  workloadSelector:
    labels:
      istio: ingressgateway
  egress:
  - hosts:
    - "./*"
    - "istio-system/*"
  ingress:
  - port:
      number: 80
      protocol: HTTP
    defaultEndpoint: 127.0.0.1:80
    bind: 0.0.0.0
    captureMode: NONE
    connectionPool:
      http:
        http1MaxPendingRequests: 1000
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 100
    outlierDetection:
      consecutiveErrors: 5
      interval: 30s
      baseEjectionTime: 30s
